items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step requires validation of the scenario where a persona attempts to share a template across businesses. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific checks or confirmations related to this scenario. The linked use cases and prior steps do not address the specific behavior expected in this exploratory step, leading to an inconclusive status.
